articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model - TechCrunch
articles.description: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.
articles.content: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell summoned bank executives for a meeting this week where they encouraged the executives to use Anthropics new Mythos model to de… [+1012 chars]
